header.title: Prompt Workbench
header.subtitle: Browse the built-in prompts and attach custom addenda to the main writing flows; currently only some chapter writing, review and repair prompts are open here.

list.searchPlaceholder: Search by id, task type, context or slot

detail.noCapabilities: This prompt declares no structured capability flags yet.
detail.selectPromptHint: Pick a prompt to view its detail.

preview.placeholder: Pick a prompt and click Preview to inspect the final messages, context selection and diagnostics.

materials.title: Material check
materials.subtitle: Pull novel materials matching this prompt's groups to verify whether everything is in place.
materials.noRequiredGroups: This prompt declares no material requirements; the default core groups will be loaded.
materials.placeholder: Enter a novel ID to load materials and verify they're ready before the prompt runs.

previewActions.title: Preview diagnostics
previewActions.subtitle: See the final messages, context selection and diagnostics together.

addendum.unsupportedNotice: This prompt doesn't accept custom addenda. You can still browse the built-in prompt, but real calls will not read additions here.
addendum.orderDescription: Once enabled, the global addendum is appended first, followed by the per-novel addendum. The built-in prompt, structured output and tool boundaries stay unchanged.
addendum.globalDescription: Use this for voice preferences, banned expressions or review focus you want to apply to every novel.
addendum.novelDescription: Use this for writing preferences, taboos, character expression limits and repair principles unique to the current novel.
addendum.contentPlaceholder: Write addenda you want the model to follow long-term: voice preferences, banned expressions, review focus or repair principles to preserve.
addendum.charCountHint: {{count}}/4000 chars. Addenda are appended as context; the built-in prompt is never modified.
addendum.selectNovel: Pick a novel to edit its addendum
